name: Savory Zucchini Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a large bowl, mix biscuit mix, onion, salt, seasoned salt, oregano, parmesan cheese, red pepper or tabasco, parsley, and garlic until well combined.
3. Add vegetable oil and beaten eggs to the mixture; stir until incorporated.
4. Fold in zucchini slices, ensuring they are evenly distributed.
5. Pour the batter into a greased 13x9x2-inch pan.
6. Bake for 25 minutes or until golden brown and set.
